footer.tagline: Admission CRM for Indian Coaching Institutes

hero.label: OnCampus
hero.title: Stop Losing Admission Leads in WhatsApp & Excel.
hero.subtitleLine1: Admission CRM built for Indian coaching institutes.
hero.subtitleLine2: Collect enquiries. Track leads. Convert admissions.
hero.subtitleLine3: All in one simple system for ₹999/month.

problem.title: Running Your Institute on Excel & WhatsApp?
problem.item1: Leads get buried in WhatsApp chats
problem.item3: Follow-ups get missed during busy days

solution.title: One Simple Admission CRM.
solution.item1: Capture leads from forms, QR, and shared links
solution.item2: Track every enquiry stage until admission
solution.item3: Keep student records in one clean system
solution.item4: Publish a public institute page in minutes
solution.item5: Run subscription billing with secure Razorpay checkout

featuresSection.title: Core Features That Drive Admissions
featuresSection.item1Description: Capture and track every admission enquiry without feature gating.
featuresSection.item2Description: Launch your institute profile with courses, contacts, and enquiry CTA.
featuresSection.item3Description: Turn posters and handouts into instant enquiry forms with QR.
featuresSection.item4Description: Migrate existing student data quickly and keep records structured.
featuresSection.item5Description: Secure recurring payments with transparent plan management.
featuresSection.item6Description: Core workflows stay available across plans so teams can scale confidently.

useCasesSection.title: Built for Real Institute Workflows
useCasesSection.item1Description: Track high-volume enquiries by source and follow up consistently until admissions close.
useCasesSection.item2Description: Organize daily walk-ins and calls in one lead pipeline without juggling multiple spreadsheets.
useCasesSection.item3Description: Manage course-wise enquiries and student records with clear conversion visibility.
useCasesSection.item4Description: Run practical admission operations for short-term programs with a simple team workflow.

trust.title: Trusted by Early-Stage Institutes
trust.subtitle: Built in India for practical coaching operations.
trust.item1: Early access institutes onboarded in Pune
trust.item3: Institute data handled with role-based access

demo.title: Institute Page Demo
demo.description: Every institute gets their own page.

pricing.title: Built for Serious Admission Operations.
pricing.description: Complete admission system with unlimited usage. Only user count differs by plan.
pricing.positioningLine: Recover your subscription cost with just one additional admission.
pricing.unlimitedUsageLine: All plans include unlimited leads, students, courses, enquiries, follow-ups, and notes.
pricing.unlimitedUsageHint: Only user count differs by plan.
pricing.coreSystemLine: Core workflows stay complete across all plans. No artificial feature gating.
pricing.starterFeature1: Public institute page with courses + enquiry
pricing.starterFeature2: Unlimited lead capture (website, QR, shared links)
pricing.starterOutcome: I run admissions in a structured, professional way without hiring extra staff.
pricing.growthOutcome: My admission team works in sync. No missed follow-ups. Faster conversions.
pricing.scaleFeature6: Lead and student operations at scale
pricing.scaleOutcome: We operate like a professional admission machine.
pricing.addonsDescription: Add-ons expand capability without forcing unnecessary upgrades.
pricing.annualLine1: Switch to Yearly and pay only 11 months for full-year access.
pricing.annualLine2: Professional annual billing for better savings and commitment.
pricing.roiLine1: If average student fee is ₹30,000, Starter at ₹999 is 30x ROI from one additional admission.
pricing.roiLine2: Long-term model is stable, trustworthy, and scalable with no future pricing regret.
pricing.faq1Question: Can I upgrade from SOLO to TEAM later?
pricing.faq1Answer: Yes, you can upgrade any time from billing.
pricing.faq2Question: What happens if I exceed my user limit?
pricing.faq2Answer: You can keep working, but adding new users requires an upgrade.
pricing.faq3Answer: Yes, both plans include a free trial period.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: Yes. You can start a free trial before choosing a paid plan.
faq.a2: Yes. You can cancel subscription from billing settings any time.
faq.a3: Yes. Payments are processed securely using Razorpay.
faq.a4: OnCampus uses authenticated access and scoped institute workspaces for data safety.
faq.a5: Yes. Team plans support multiple users with role-based access.
faq.q6: Do you handle student fee payments?
faq.a6: Yes. You can track fee collections and payment records inside OnCampus.

pages.landingMetaTitle: OnCampus - Admission CRM for Coaching Institutes

pages.pricingMetaDescription: Starter ₹999, Growth ₹1,999, Scale ₹3,999 for serious admission operations.
pages.featuresMetaDescription: Explore OnCampus features for leads, students, fees, payments, and institute public pages.

featuresPage.title: Everything your institute needs to run daily operations.
